card_text: Camarilla: As Andrew plays a card requiring Blood Sorcery [tha] (before replacing the card), reveal the top card of your library. If it also requires Blood Sorcery, the card played is canceled and Andrew burns 1 blood.

rulings.text: His ability needs to be applied before anyone has an opportunity to play another cancellation effect (eg. {Direct Intervention}). [LSJ 20100728] [LSJ 20090213]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]
If an action is canceled, it is not performed and the minion is free to attempt the same action again. [RBK cancel-a-card]

rulings.group: Equip or employ another card from hand

rulings.text: Cannot select cards that are "playable as if in hand" (e.g. from {The Erciyes Fragments}) [LSJ 20050913]
rulings.group: Equip or employ another card from hand

rulings.text: Requirements apply but do not count as requirements for the action (eg. you cannot use CrimethInc. if the card requires an Anarch). [LSJ 20100725] [LSJ 20100303] [ANK 20180817]

This does not count as performing the action to employ/recruit/equip this retainer/ally/equipment in respect to section 3 of the rules. The same vampire can play the respective card in a normal fashion during their turn, if unlocked. [LSJ 20080815]
This is not an action, so cost reductions referring to an action do not apply.  (e.g. {Charisma}, {Erichtho}) [LSJ 20090115-1] [ANK 20170309]
The card is not "played" by the minion (e.g. {Louhi}'s ability cannot cancel it). [ANK 20201229]
Cost reductions that are not referring to an action apply . [ANK 20230824] [RTR 20070707]

rulings.text: Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]

rulings.text: Can be used to meet one (but not more than one) of the normal Discipline requirements of a multi-Discipline card. [LSJ 20011217] [LSJ 20090508]
While a minion has an effect that allows them to play cards that require Discipline(s), they do not actually have those Discipline(s). [LSJ 19980303]

Multiple similar effects (e.g. two {Infernal Familiar}, or {Ian Forestal} with an {Infernal Familiar}) cannot be used to meet the requirements of a multi-Discipline card that the minion is missing one or more Disciplines to play. [LSJ 20020218]

While using their ability to meet a discipline requirement, they also meet that requirement for any other cards associated with the original effect (e.g. meeting the [ani] requirement for {Pack Alpha} or {Muricia's Call} also meets the [ani] requirement for the {Raven Spy} employed by that effect). card_text:
Independent: Jan can burn 3 blood to cancel a Gehenna card as it is played.
[MERGED] While Jan is Independent or Anarch and there are any Gehenna cards in play, he gets +3 votes.

rulings.text: [MERGED] Is Independent. If the base version was the one in play, it changes sect as it is merged. If it had an anarch token, it is burned. [ANK 20180524]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]

card_text: Camarilla Prince of Houston: While Karen is a prince, Gehenna events do not affect her. She gets +1 stealth on undirected actions.
title: Prince

rulings.text:
She can't take actions provided by Gehenna events in play ({The New Inquisition}, {Break the Code}, {Restricted Vitae}). She keeps her title if {Fall of the Camarilla} is played. Her controller doesn't reveal cards due to {Veil of Darkness} when she plays cards requiring disciplines.
She doesn't become immune to blood hunts via {Fueled by Heart's Blood}. [LSJ 20100121] [LSJ 20081120-2]

She can be chosen for the effects of a Gehenna event, but stays unaffected: she can be chosen for {Recalled to the Founder}, but doesn't burn. Her controller can choose to discard a card for her for {Nightmares upon Nightmares}, but she isn't locked if they don't. {Blood Trade} can't move blood from her, and blood moved to her go to the blood bank instead. [LSJ 20081120-2] [LSJ 20100121]

Her immunity does not extend to other things affected by events: Allies still benefit from {The Unmasking} intercept when trying to block her. Locations on her are affected by {Conquest of Humanity}. Her controller burns pool to {Dragonbound} while she is in Torpor. [LSJ 20081120-2] [LSJ 20100121]

Keeps their title and votes if they changes sects. [LSJ 20010714]
When meeting a title requirement for a political action, the vampire does not get the title's votes for the subsequent referendum. [ANK 20231221]

rulings.text: Can meet a sect-specific title (e.g. Justicar) requirement even if the sect does not exist anymore (eg. {Fall of the Camarilla}). [ANK 20230503] [LSJ 20050124]

The ability ability cannot be used to fulfill card requirements if they are not played normally, like when using {Concealed Weapon} for an equipment or {Piper} or {The Summoning} for an ally. [LSJ 20050119]

rulings.text: When meeting a requirement to play a card, the vampire is treated as such for all the effects of the card, and only them, including duration effects. card_text: Laibon: Khalu may burn 5 blood to cancel a minion card played by your predator or prey as it is played (no cost is paid).

rulings.text: Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]

card_text: Sabbat cardinal: Once each turn, if Louhi is ready, she can burn 1 blood to cancel an action card as it is played by a vampire controlled by your predator (the acting minion does not lock).
title: Cardinal

rulings.text: "Once each turn" means once during each player's turn. [ANK 20180719-4]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]
If an action is canceled, it is not performed and the minion is free to attempt the same action again. [RBK cancel-a-card]
Can only cancel minion cards played from the hand in the normal fashion (eg. can't cancel allies played via {Piper}). [RTR 20001020]
Can be used to cancel all action cards, including employ retainer, recruit ally and political action. [ANK 20200813-2]

name: Louhi (G4)

card_text: Independent. 2 votes (titled): You and Mata Hari can play cards requiring a sect and/or clan as if she were of that required sect and/or clan. Red List.
title: 2 votes

rulings.text: If a contract chooses her when played (eg. {Dirty Contract}), she is "chosen for the contract" for other cards (eg. {Open Dossier}). If the contract choice is an effect of the card in play (eg. {Clandestine Contract}), she's not chosen. [LSJ 20070708] [LSJ 20071109]
When playing a card requiring a sect, her title makes her a titled vampire of that sect (eg. she can play {Hand Intervention}). [LSJ 20050526]
Orun and Aye cards cannot be placed on her as long as she's not a Laibon. [LSJ 20110611]

If her capacity is above 10 when playing {Call the Great Beast}, she burns and it is put into play. If her capacity is less, the card is put on her with tokens equal to her capacity, but she will not be able to add counters to it later on. [ANK 20180723]
You can still use the burn options of cards with a requirement she could meet when you play them, but does not meet while in play. [LSJ 20050225]
Keeps their title and votes if they changes sects. [LSJ 20010714]

The ability ability cannot be used to fulfill card requirements if they are not played normally, like when using {Concealed Weapon} for an equipment or {Piper} or {The Summoning} for an ally. [LSJ 20050119]
rulings.group: Impersonating requirements for cards not played normally

rulings.text: When meeting a requirement to play a card, the vampire is treated as such for all the effects of the card, and only them, including duration effects. The vampire is not treated as meeting the requirements for effects the card has from being in play. [LSJ 20101013] [ANK 20190228] [ANK 20200703-3] [LSJ 20070708] [RTR 20070707]

rulings.text: Can only use her ability when she is in combat herself. [ANK 20221021]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]

card_text: Camarilla: Santaleous gets +1 bleed for each unique hunting ground in play. He can burn 3 blood to cancel a master card as it is played.

rulings.text: Can use his ability to cancel a master card multiple times each turn. [ANK 20200420-2]
When using his ability, the cost of the canceled card must still be paid. [LSJ 20090601-2]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]

name: Santaleous (G5)

He can meet the requirements for his controller to play any card, including Master cards. [LSJ 20091015] [PIB 20130128]
If a card he plays is canceled as it is played, he is still considered having used the requirement, if any. [ANK 20200710]

Vampire traits: titles, "Red List", "Flight", non-requirements (eg. non-Red List) are vampire traits. Mortal, unlocked, ready, older, Striga, Maleficia, etc. are not. [LSJ 20081120-1] [LSJ 20091016] [LSJ 20100226]

Titles: When meeting a title requirement, he is considered a member of the underlying sect. He can meet a given generic title (eg. Prince) only once, but the controller chooses how it is met (any city, even a made-up one). He must choose a title when playing a card required a "titled" vampire (eg. {Rubicon}), but can only choose each title once. He can choose the non-descript "X votes" title, but only once. [LSJ 20050128] [PIB 20150306] [PIB 20150307] [ANK 20211019]

If a contract chooses him when played (eg. {Dirty Contract}), he is "chosen for the contract" for other cards (eg. {Open Dossier}). If the contract choice is an effect of the card in play (eg. {Clandestine Contract}), he's not chosen. [LSJ 20070708] [LSJ 20071109]
Orun and Aye cards cannot be placed on him as long as he's not a Laibon. [LSJ 20110611]

If his capacity is above 10 when playing {Call the Great Beast}, he burns and it is put into play. If his capacity is less, the card is put on him with tokens equal to his capacity, but he will not be able to add counters to it later on. [ANK 20180723]
You can still use the burn options of cards with a requirement he could meet when you play them, but does not meet while in play. [LSJ 20050225]
His ability do not let him fulfill card requirements if they are not played normally, like when using {Concealed Weapon} for an equipment or {Piper} or {The Summoning} for an ally. [LSJ 20050119]
When meeting a title requirement for a political action, the vampire does not get the title's votes for the subsequent referendum. [ANK 20231221]
rulings.group: Impersonating a title for political action

rulings.text: Can meet a sect-specific title (e.g. Justicar) requirement even if the sect does not exist anymore (eg. {Fall of the Camarilla}). [ANK 20230503] [LSJ 20050124]

card_text: Independent: Vlad uses and can play cards requiring a title or a sect as if he had that required title or were of that required sect. +1 bleed.

rulings.text: When playing a card requiring a title or a sect, he is treated as a such for all effects of the card, including duration effects. (eg. he can {Archon} himself and use its effect later) [ANK 20201028] [ANK 20190228] [LSJ 20101013]
He can use {No Secrets From the Magaji} to attempt to block a vampire acting with no stealth. REVERSAL from previous rulings. [ANK 20210903]
When meeting a title requirement, he is considered as a vampire of the underlying sect. [LSJ 20050128]
When meeting a requirement, the controller can choose how he meets it (eg. he can play {Anarch Secession} as a Prince of any city, even a made-up one). [PIB 20150306] [PIB 20150307]
He can use a card requiring a sect or titled to be played (eg. use {Abbot} intercept bonus as a Sabbat vampire, perform {Archon} action to burn it as a Prince or Justicar). [PIB 20150306]

He cannot use a card as a vampire of a sect or with a title if the card does not require the sect or title to be played. (eg. he cannot benefit from {Powerbase: Madrid} as a Sabbat vampire) [PIB 20150304]

If Vlad gains a title via a title card (eg. {Fee Stake: Perth}), as long as Vlad is not the correct sect, the title is dormant. He counts as untitled if he has a dormant title. He cannot "use" his title to become titled. [ANK 20190211]
When meeting a title requirement for a political action, the vampire does not get the title's votes for the subsequent referendum. [ANK 20231221]
rulings.group: Impersonating a title for political action

rulings.text: Can meet a sect-specific title (e.g. Justicar) requirement even if the sect does not exist anymore (eg. {Fall of the Camarilla}). [ANK 20230503] [LSJ 20050124]

The ability ability cannot be used to fulfill card requirements if they are not played normally, like when using {Concealed Weapon} for an equipment or {Piper} or {The Summoning} for an ally. [LSJ 20050119]

card_text: Laibon: If another Laibon you control is blocked while equipping, recruiting, or employing, you can lock Wamukota before block resolution to lock the blocking minion and have that Laibon continue the action as if unblocked. +1 bleed.

rulings.text: If the action continues "as if unblocked", all action modifiers and reaction cards are still in effect, even those pertaining to a successful block. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20190116]
If the action continues "as if unblocked", Methuselah that had declined to block before do not get another opportunity to block. [ANK 20190116]

"continue as if unblocked" moves the action card from the ash heap (where it went when the action was blocked) to limbo (where it should be if the action is not blocked). If the action card is not in the ash heap, then the action cannot be continued. [LSJ 20070808-1]
His ability to end combat can be used when he is in torpor. [LSJ 20011022]

card_text: Camarilla: Once each combat, Watenda can cancel the effect of a combat card the opposing minion plays by burning an amount of blood equal to the blood or pool cost of the card. If the card is a strike card, the opposing minion chooses a new strike.

rulings.text: The cost he pays takes into account any cost modification that applies for the opposing minion. [LSJ 20091124]
When canceling a card, he pays any pool cost in blood. [LSJ 20071015-2]
Can use his ability even if he's going to torpor. [LSJ 20021007]
Can only use his ability when he is in combat himself. [ANK 20221021]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]
